# ScarletFlash Consulting

> Creative + Tech Consulting — Where Ideas Ignite

ScarletFlash Consulting brings 20+ years of expertise across design, product, and technology to help creative agencies sharpen their edge, startups turn bold ideas into scalable products, and small businesses grow smarter. We bring the clarity, strategy, and execution to move you forward with confidence and measurable momentum.

- Website: https://scarletflash.io
- Contact: arun.sarma@live.in
- Location: Bengaluru, India (serving clients globally)

## Services

### Product Design + UX
From first click to final step — intuitive, purposeful design that turns complexity into
experiences users love. We prototype, test, and refine until the experience feels effortless,
because good design converts.

### Tech Strategy + Automation
Strategic solutions that eliminate friction, automate the complex, and unlock real efficiency.
Stack audits, automation opportunities, and eliminating repetitive work so your team can focus
on what matters.

### Project Management + Tooling
From kickoff to delivery, structured project management and smart tooling keeps complexity
under control and teams on track. Sprints, roadmaps, async workflows, and the systems that help
teams ship consistently and predictably.

## How We Work

1. **Discover** — Deep dive into your goals, constraints, and opportunities.
2. **Define** — Sharp brief. Clear scope. No ambiguity.
3. **Build** — Quick sprints with full visibility. Real work, fast feedback loops.
4. **Launch** — Ship with confidence. We stay close through go-live and beyond.

## About

**Founder:** Arun Sarma
**Experience:** 20+ years across design, product, technology, and leadership
**Focus:** Digital transformation for ambitious teams and growing businesses

ScarletFlash operates with speed and precision — embedding fast, thinking sharp, and delivering
work that moves the needle across strategy, design, and technology. Every engagement is built
on four non-negotiables: speed, clarity, quality, and impact you can measure. Human expertise
meets AI capability so every decision is sharper, every outcome faster, and every result
measurable.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What does ScarletFlash Consulting do?**
A: ScarletFlash Consulting is a creative and technology consulting firm with 20+ years of expertise. We help creative agencies, startups, and small businesses with product design & UX, tech strategy & automation, and project management — combining human expertise with AI capability to deliver fast, measurable results.

**Q: Who is ScarletFlash best suited for?**
A: ScarletFlash works with creative agencies looking to sharpen their competitive edge, startups ready to turn bold ideas into scalable products, and small businesses that want to grow smarter with clearer strategy and execution.

**Q: What services does ScarletFlash offer?**
A: Three core areas: Product Design & UX, Tech Strategy & Automation, and Project Management & Tooling.

**Q: What does the engagement process look like?**
A: Four phases — Discover, Define, Build, and Launch — focused on speed, clarity, and measurable outcomes.

**Q: How do I start a project with ScarletFlash?**
A: Use the contact form at scarletflash.io. Share your project details and we'll respond within one business day.

## Contact

To start a project or ask a question, use the contact form at https://scarletflash.io/#contact
or email arun.sarma@live.in. We respond within one business day.
